title: zephyranthes atamasco var. treatiae
intro: Zephyranthes atamasco var. treatiae, also known as the Atamasco Lily or Treat's Lily, is a flowering plant species native to the southeastern United States. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Zephyranthes atamasco var. treatiae include treating wounds, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and pneumonia. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
